claims.snippet: average value of $x^2$ on $[0,1]$ is also $1/2$

issues.title: Incorrect average value
issues.snippet: average value of $x^2$ on $[0,1]$ is also $1/2$
issues.explanation: The stated average value does not match the average-value formula applied to the expression and interval.
issues.fix: Replace the stated value with `\frac{1}{3}` and show the formula `(1/(b-a))∫_a^b f(x)dx`.
issues.evidence: SymPy computed the average value as \frac{1}{3} while the draft states \frac{1}{2}.
